case_title: MANEESH KENIA VS. PHUNWARE, INC., et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF KENIA, MANEESH AS TO DEFENDANT PHUNWARE, INC., A FOREIGN CORPORATION GOTV NETWORKS, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
